## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance and content updates.](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog pages performing well; April dip likely seasonal](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Per diem, expense category, and tuning pages stable; treasury pages meeting expectations](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [AI overviews in Google potentially impacting expense category page performance](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Content refresh process to be streamlined, with more responsibility shifting to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Overview

  - [Blog pages: Recovering from April dip, showing steady increase in views/sessions](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Per diem pages: Stable performance, avg. ranking of 5 across queries](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Expense category pages: Potential impact from AI overviews in Google SERPs](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Tuning pages: Slight upward trend post-refresh; 2nd batch still volatile but improving](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Treasury pages: Performing as expected given low volume](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Vendor pages: Limited traction, awaiting more content](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)

### Content Updates and Workflow

  - [Large spreadsheet of refresh suggestions sent by Nika, categorized by Matt](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Awaiting feedback on new batch event pages and best bank articles](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Basecamp trial pages to be published by EOD (3-4 remaining)](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Technical issue with table data not carrying over to live pages (Victoria to follow up)](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Nika and Mara on vacation; Vivek to handle communications](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Ramp team reviewing month-over-month post-update refresh process](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Plan to offload more refresh work to GrowthX team, especially for underperforming posts](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Refreshes to become part of ongoing workflow](https://fathom.video/share/_zyb3dchPCXpmHY3jebdA2L6xceskoKT?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
